items.title: US warns shipping firms over paying Iran to transit Strait of Hormuz

items.title: Ukraine eyes Belarus border activities as Russian strikes persist
items.desc: The role of Belarus in Russia's war on Ukraine has provoked sanctions from Kyiv, which says it is ready to respond.

items.title: Trump vows to cut US troops stationed in Germany 'way down'
items.desc: The US president doubled down on the Pentagon's announcement of plans to withdraw 5,000 troops. Germany's Defense Minister Boris Pistorius said Europe must do more for its own security. Follow DW.

items.title: Over 20K Europeans flock to ‘dangerous’ rave on French military field littered with potentially active mines
items.desc: Over 20,000 partygoers from across Europe swarmed an illegal rave on a “dangerous” French military site that is reportedly littered with active explosive devices.

items.title: West Bengal polls: Election Commission scraps Falta election, orders repolling on May 21
items.desc: Bengal's electoral landscape has shifted as the Election Commission cancelled polling in Falta constituency due to widespread EVM tampering. A repoll is set for May 21, making it a unique post-result election. Allegations of threats against villagers and the …

items.title: Taiwan's Lai lands in Eswatini in a trip delayed by lack of overflight clearance
items.desc: Eswatini remains the only African nation without tariff-free access to China's market due to its ties with Taiwan.

items.title: MCF Raebareli unveils its first Vande Bharat trainset, sends it for trials
items.desc: MCF Raebareli rolls out its first 16-coach Vande Bharat trainset, sent to RDSO for trials on the Khajuraho–Mahoba section before passenger service.

items.title: Syria becomes alternative energy corridor for oil as Hormuz effectively blo
items.desc: Syria is receiving hundreds of Iraqi oil trucks hauling crude overland as an alternative energy corridor to Europe.

items.title: CBI court issues NBW against 8 in SI job scam
items.desc: A CBI court has issued non-bailable warrants against eight middlemen implicated in the Odisha police sub-inspector recruitment scam. These individuals are suspected of facilitating unfair means during the recruitment process. The CBI's investigation has uncov…

items.title: Goldman Sachs says the S&P 500's run past 7,100 is 'froth' — a previous time Wall Street said that, a crash followed
items.desc: Price might be outpacing value as investors allow FOMO to guide their purchases.

items.title: LMC calls for ‘zero waste’ bhandaras on Bada Mangal
items.desc: Lucknow Municipal Corporation urges zero-waste Bada Mangal bhandaras; registration via 1533 or Lucknow One app mandatory; avoid plastic, use biodegradable.

items.title: Lucknow tops UP in revenue case disposal in Apr
items.desc: Lucknow led Uttar Pradesh in April revenue case disposals with 18,861 cases, RCCMS report shows; 3.37 lakh cases cleared statewide amid priority drive.

items.title: IT College researchers come up with low-cost indoor air filtration system
items.desc: Isabella Thoburn College researchers in Lucknow develop a Rs2,500 indoor air filter using fly ash and biomass, cutting VOCs up to 80% and targeting kitchen pollution.

items.title: Entry fee set for sports arena at Lohia Park
items.desc: Lucknow LDA sets fees, timings for Oxygen Sports Arena at Lohia Park: skating Rs 1,500/month; courts Rs 200–600/hr; open 6am–8pm.

items.title: 4 new PG courses at BBAU
items.desc: BBAU to launch four new PG courses in 2026-27: MA English, MA Geography, MSc Psychology and MSc Cognitive Science, with 40-50 seats each pending approval.
